title: Virginia Advances in ACC Tourney with Victory Over NC State
summary: No. 10 Virginia defeats NC State 81-74 for the third time this season to advance in the ACC Tournament. Malik Thomas scored 16 points.
charlotte_impact: Virginia's victory impacts their standing in the ACC Tournament and their chances for NCAA selection.

title: Virginia Secures Win Against NC State, 81-74
summary: Virginia defeated N.C. State for the third time this season, with Malik Thomas and Thijs De Ridder leading the scoring.
charlotte_impact: This win is crucial for Virginia's momentum in the ACC Tournament.

title: Virginia and NC State Face Off in ACC Tournament Quarterfinals
summary: Virginia plays NC State in the quarterfinal round of the 2026 ACC Tournament in Charlotte.

title: NC State vs. Virginia: ACC Tournament Odds and Predictions
summary: NC State Wolfpack meet the No. 11 Virginia Cavaliers in the ACC Tournament quarterfinal in Charlotte.

title: Power Outage Affects Concord Mills and I-85 Exit
summary: A power outage is impacting Concord Mills and the I-85 exit. The cause of the outage is currently unknown.

summary: Carson Parker, 41, is arrested for shooting into a vehicle during a road rage incident on Saturday.
